summary: Iteration 23: Financiering & Subsidie Check Module - All tests passed. Fixed LlmChat initialization bug in subsidy_engine.py. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All 5-step intake flow, AI analyse, document generation, and CTA buttons working correctly in all 3 configurators (Recreatie, Chalet, FEC).

fixed.issue: LlmChat.__init__() missing required positional arguments 'session_id' and 'system_message'
fixed.fix: Updated LlmChat initialization to include session_id and system_message parameters, changed send_async to send_message
Applied same fix as ai-analyse endpoint

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 tested the new Financiering & Subsidie Check module. All 3 API endpoints working: POST /api/subsidy/check (rules-based scoring), POST /api/subsidy/ai-analyse (GPT-5.2 AI analysis), POST /api/subsidy/generate-document (AI document generator). Frontend SubsidyModule works in all 3 configurators (Recreatie, Chalet, FEC) with 5-step intake form, results display, AI analyse, document generation, and CTA buttons.

backend_apis: POST /api/subsidy/check - rules-based scoring returns score, kans, breakdown, subsidie_range, advies
POST /api/subsidy/check with investering < €10K triggers hard filter (lage kans)
POST /api/subsidy/check with high score returns kans=hoog
POST /api/subsidy/ai-analyse - returns rules score + ai_analyse from GPT-5.2
POST /api/subsidy/generate-document - returns formatted subsidy application document
frontend_ui: Recreatie flow: 'Subsidie Check' button in header opens right sidebar with SubsidyModule
SubsidyModule Step 1: sector and rechtsvorm radio buttons
SubsidyModule Step 2: projectomschrijving textarea and doel radio buttons
SubsidyModule Step 3: investering and eigen_investering radio buttons
SubsidyModule Step 5: samenwerking and duurzaamheid radio buttons
SubsidyModule: completing all 5 steps shows results with score, kans label, subsidie_range, breakdown
SubsidyModule: results view has 'AI Subsidie Analyse' button
SubsidyModule: results view has 'Genereer subsidie-aanvraag' button
SubsidyModule: results view has CTA buttons (Laat RECRA dit voor je regelen, Plan adviesgesprek)
ChaletWizard: 'Subsidie Check' button in header opens subsidy panel
FecWizard: 'Subsidie Check' button in header opens subsidy panel
SubsidyModule can be closed via X button

rca_of_the_issue.issue: AI endpoints returning error: LlmChat.__init__() missing 2 required positional arguments: 'session_id' and 'system_message'
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The LlmChat class from emergentintegrations.llm.chat requires session_id and system_message parameters in the constructor, but subsidy_engine.py was only passing api_key
reproduction_steps: 1. Call POST /api/subsidy/ai-analyse with valid intake data
2. Backend returns ai_error with missing arguments message
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Updated LlmChat initialization to include all required parameters: api_key, session_id (using uuid), system_message. Also changed send_async(UserMessage(content=...)) to send_message(UserMessage(text=...)) to match the correct API
